summary: Iteration 28: Phase 1 Site Restructuring - All tests pass. New landing page with psychological marketing texts verified ('Ремонт без стрес — БЕЗПЛАТНО'), new navigation structure (AI Sketch, Помещения, Готови проекти, Фирми in More dropdown), /ready-projects social page with likes/comments/sharing, AI Sketch page with 4-step text instructions (no video). Removed items (AI Дизайнер, 3D Скенер, AI Галерия) correctly NOT in navigation.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/ready-projects - Creates project with auth (returns id)
✅ Homepage loads with new hero: 'Ремонт без стрес — БЕЗПЛАТНО'
✅ Homepage problem-solution section with 3 cards (Лутане, Търсене, Неясни)
✅ Homepage pricing section with БАЗОВ/ПРО/PREMIUM cards
✅ Navigation 'Още' dropdown has: AI Sketch, Помещения, Готови проекти, Фирми
✅ Navigation does NOT have: AI Дизайнер, 3D Скенер, AI Галерия (correctly removed)
✅ /ready-projects shows 'ГОТОВИ ПРОЕКТИ' header and 'Проекти от общността' subtitle
✅ /ready-projects shows project cards with like/comment/share buttons
✅ /ai-sketch page loads with 4-step text instructions (no video)
✅ /ai-sketch has all 4 steps: Качете скица, AI анализира 30сек, 360° 3D модел, Изтегли .glb + Оферта
critical_code_review_comments: 1. LandingPage component correctly implements new hero with psychological marketing texts
2. Navigation dropdown correctly restructured: AI Sketch, Помещения, Готови проекти, Фирми
3. ReadyProjectsPage implements social features: likes (toggle), comments, sharing
4. AISketchPage uses 4-step text instructions instead of video
6. All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
7. Ready Projects API correctly implements CRUD with auth requirements
